name: Hugh Agro
background: Mr. Agro is a mining executive with over 30 years of experience in the mining industry. He was previously Executive Vice President, Strategic Development with Kinross Gold Corporation. Prior to Kinross, Mr. Agro was a mining investment banker with Deutsche Bank and a management consultant with Placer Dome. He is a Director of Fortitude Gold Corp. and a former Director of Victoria Gold Corp.

companies.name: Revival Gold Inc.
companies.title_or_role: President, Chief Executive Officer and Director
